description: Upstream tooling gaps, hardware workarounds, and open implementation items. Decisions documented here override upstream defaults in the MiOS build pipeline.

tooling_gaps.summary: rpm-ostree cannot consume OCI 1.1 bundle format produced by cosign v3
tooling_gaps.workaround: Pin cosign to v2.x. Enforced in automation/42-cosign-policy.sh and PACKAGES.md packages-supply-chain block.

tooling_gaps.summary: --squash-all on podman build or bootc-image-builder strips ostree.final-diffid OCI metadata, breaking the bootc update chain
tooling_gaps.workaround: Never pass --squash-all. Enforced in Hard Rules (system.md) and Containerfile.

tooling_gaps.summary: bootc-fetch-apply-updates.timer ignores Flatpaks and Distrobox containers
tooling_gaps.workaround: Replaced with uupd (Universal Blue unified updater). Installed in automation/43-uupd-installer.sh.

tooling_gaps.summary: DNF4 install_weakdeps option is silently ignored by DNF5; correct DNF5 form is install_weak_deps (underscore)
tooling_gaps.workaround: All automation scripts use install_weak_deps=False. Enforced in system.md hard rules and .cursorrules.

tooling_gaps.summary: Fedora 44 filesystem package %posttrans Lua scriptlet fails in containerized OCI builds
tooling_gaps.workaround: Two-phase distro-sync: phase 1 installs core libs, phase 2 installs userspace. Implemented in automation/01-repos.sh.

hardware_gaps.summary: NVIDIA RTX 50-series (Blackwell) reset bug with VFIO passthrough
WSL2 kernel lacks nftables support; firewalld nftables backend fails silently in WSL2
hardware_gaps.workaround: Image includes iptables-legacy. WSL2 deployments fall back to iptables-legacy backend automatically.

hardware_gaps.summary: GTK_THEME environment variable does not apply to GTK4/libadwaita apps
hardware_gaps.workaround: Use ADW_DEBUG_COLOR_SCHEME=prefer-dark and dconf color-scheme='prefer-dark'. GTK_THEME=Adwaita-dark is banned in all MiOS scripts.

hardware_gaps.summary: malcontent parental control package is a hard dependency of gnome-shell; removing it uninstalls the entire GNOME desktop
hardware_gaps.workaround: malcontent is retained in the image. Do not remove it from PACKAGES.md packages-gnome block.

planned_integrations.summary: Full composefs + UKI (Unified Kernel Image) boot chain
planned_integrations.current_state: Prep script exists (automation/23-uki-render.sh, non-fatal). Awaiting upstream bootloader stabilization.

planned_integrations.summary: Full measured boot attestation via sbsigntools and tpm2-tss
planned_integrations.current_state: TPM2 tooling present in image. Full attestation partially implemented; awaiting upstream stabilization.

planned_integrations.summary: Automated model pull (LocalAI/Ollama) in CI pipeline
planned_integrations.current_state: Skipped in CI due to runner resource constraints (automation/37-ollama-prep.sh Containerfile-only). Models are a Day-2 post-install step.

openai_api_surface.description: All AI API endpoints follow OpenAI v1 spec. No vendor-specific extensions.
